'''√f-sh-dh''' ('''kafashadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deblouse|deblouse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deblouse|deblouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √f-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kafashadh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thifashadh || jifashadh || shifashadh || kifashadh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthufashadh || jujufashadh || shushufashadh || kukufashadh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thufashadh || jufashadh || shufashadh || kufashadh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thufashadh || jufashadh || shufashadh || kufashadh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thefashadh || jefashadh || shefashadh || kefashadh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothofashadh || jojofashadh || shoshofashadh || kokofashadh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thofashadh || jofashadh || shofashadh || kofashadh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thofashadh || jofashadh || shofashadh || kofashadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh || fashadh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæfashadh || jæfashadh || shæfashadh || kæfashadh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathafashadh || jajafashadh || shashafashadh || kakafashadh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thafashadh || jafashadh || shafashadh || kafashadh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thafashadh || jafashadh || shafashadh || kafashadh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shafashadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshafashadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishafashadh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shafashadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshafashadhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishafashadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shafashadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshafashadhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishafashadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shafashadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshafashadhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishafashadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shafashadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshafashadhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishafashadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shafashadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshafashadhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishafashadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shafashadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshafashadhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishafashadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shafashadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshafashadhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishafashadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shafashadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshafashadhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishafashadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shafashadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshafashadhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishafashadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shafashadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafashadhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafashadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shafashadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshafashadhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafashadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shafashadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshafashadhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishafashadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shafashadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafashadhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafashadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shafashadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshafashadhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafashadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shafashadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshafashadhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishafashadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shafashadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshafashadhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishafashadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shafashadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshafashadhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafashadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shafashadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshafashadhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishafashadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shafashadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshafashadhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishafashadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shafashadhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafashadhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafashadhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
